LanguageData.Ammo_22WMR_FMJ.label: .22 WMR (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_22WMR_FMJ.description: Common rimfire cartridge with noticebly more power than other .22 rimfire rounds.

LanguageData.Ammo_22WMR_AP.description: Common rimfire cartridge with noticebly more power than other .22 rimfire rounds.
LanguageData.Ammo_22WMR_HP.label: .22 WMR (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_22WMR_HP.description: Common rimfire cartridge with noticebly more power than other .22 rimfire rounds.
LanguageData.Bullet_22WMR_FMJ.label: .22 WMR bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_22WMR_AP.label: .22 WMR bullet (AP)
